name: 侯爵府客房
description: 华贵的客房，陈设考究。室内有一张雕花软榻，旁边的小几上放着冒着热气的药碗。黄昏时分，室内点燃了摇曳的烛火，映照着精致的屏风和厚重的帷幔。
visual_reference: Interior of a luxurious guest room in an ancient Chinese Marquis manor. An ornate wooden daybed, a small table with a steaming medicine bowl. Dusk lighting, flickering candlelight casting warm glows on elegant folding screens and heavy silk curtains. Cinematic, emotional, highly detailed.
lighting: 黄昏的幽暗与室内温暖的烛光交织，形成强烈的冷暖对比，烛光摇曳不定。
emotional_range: 旁观他人暧昧的冷漠与索然无味。
